title: Frens
description: Companion bots for Minecraft with survival skills, autonomous behaviors, and persistent inventories. They can woodcut, mine, fish, build shelters, ride animals, follow and defend, return to base & sleep at sunset.
body:
Frens adds friendly NPC companions to Minecraft.

Spawn a companion, have them follow you, and assign survival tasks like woodcutting, mining, fishing, and basic building. Companions keep their inventory and stats between sessions and are built to handle everyday hazards while they work. See some examples of Frens in action:
